response.justification: The candidate lacks mandatory C++ experience on Windows and has no demonstrated background in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domains; their career is centered on web, mobile, and open-source projects using TypeScript, DLang, and Node.js, with only a brief, unrelated C++ exposure during academic work.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across diverse technologies and domains
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and technical workshops
Solid CI/CD and DevOps practices from multiple roles
concerns: No professional C++ development on Windows platform as required
Zero evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or banking domain experience
SQL experience listed but not tied to SQL Server or Oracle in financial systems context
